properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Tho' shadows deepen, and my heart bleeds, I will not question the way He leads; This side of Heaven we know in part, I will not question a broken heart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We'll talk it over in the bye and bye. We'll talk it over, my Lord and I. I'll ask the reasons - He'll tell me why, When we talk it over in the bye and bye.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'll trust His leading, He'll never fail, Thru darkest tunnels or misty vales. Obey his bidding and faithful be, Tho' only one step ahead I see.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'll hide my heartache behind a smile And wait for reasons'til after while. And tho' He try me, I know I'll find That all my burdens are silver lined.
